differences: Leftover card meta copy is date-based because the current MVP API does not expose meal label or serving count.
Null recipe thumbnails render the MVP fallback food tile rather than prototype-specific bitmap thumbnails.
The shared bottom-tab pantry icon has a slightly different glyph shape from the fixed prototype.
suggestions: Only add meal label, serving count, or thumbnail data after an official contract update exposes those fields.
Keep shared bottom-tab icon reshaping in a shared navigation follow-up.
reasoning: The mobile LEFTOVERS and ATE_LIST surfaces now match the fixed reference layout, app bar, card density, CTA hierarchy, colors, radius, and bottom-tab placement. Remaining differences are classified contract/shared-navigation follow-ups, so unclassified visual differences are 0.
